_comment: Managed by scripts/migrations/run_migrations.py. Do not hand-edit applied_migrations or history — run the migration runner instead. See docs/data_dictionary.md for what each schema version means.

history.description: Add stable record_id columns to the 9 category sub-metric CSVs, metric_changelog.csv, solution_verticals.csv and news_log.csv.
Add data/metric_results_history.csv and data/verification_levels.json (R2-T01); migrate existing category sub-metric rows into a period-indexed, append-only result history without changing scoring.
Add data/contacts.csv, data/contact_aliases.csv, data/contact_evidence.jsonl and data/contact_evidence_fields.json (Contacts Phase 1 / R3-T01) — new registers, nothing to backfill.

Add a 'category' column to data/objectives.csv (relationship / commercial / strategic / operational / recognition) — pre-existing rows backfilled blank, to be sorted via 'objectives.py edit --category'.
